fields.label: Have you paid your yearly contribution for last year?

options.label: I am a new joining member.
options.value: I am a new joining member.

fields.label: Compulsory for ALL TRAINING MEMBERS. Please Pay this year's contribution fee.
fields.subtext:
- **For Students/Azubis:**  **50€ only** (i.e. less than 5€ a month)

- **For Others:**  **100€**

---

**Payment via PayPal:**

📧 [nftmunich@gmail.com](mailto:nftmunich@gmail.com)

**Subject:** `NFT Yearly Contribution 2025_your name_email`

---

### 📌 **Note:**
We are a team **without sponsors or any income**. Therefore, we have to rely on **your support** to function financially.

We work as efficiently as possible. Your contributions help us cover:

- Upcoming matches
- Ground bookings
- Programs and logistics
- Training materials (footballs, Trikots, etc.)

At the end of the year, we will **email you the yearly balance sheet**.

> ⚠️ **Please note:** Paying the contribution **does not guarantee** a spot in the squad. Squad selection will be a sporting decision.

---

### **Please pay the yearly contribution.**
**Deadline: June**

---

### **PS:**
There is an option to opt out of yearly contribution (see below option 4). In that case, everybody is welcome to play and train with us. For that, you don't need to pay. But we won't be able to plan you for events/friendlies/tournaments though, where our financial resources get used. The contribution is for that purpose only.

---

FAZIT: PLAYING FOOTBALL WITH US DOESN'T COST MONEY 🙂
